name: forgeax-studio
description: ForgeaX Studio — AI-native game development environment

scripts.lint:boundaries: bun scripts/check-boundaries.ts --strict && bun run lint:boundaries:cli-runtime && bun run lint:boundaries:orchestrator && bun run lint:boundaries:agent-host
scripts.test:boundaries: bun test scripts/check-boundaries.spec.ts && bun run test:agent-runtime-guard

comment_dependencies: react-dom 19 declares scheduler as a peer dep, but bun (≥1.3) does not auto-install peer deps the way npm/pnpm do. Without an explicit dependency here, esbuild fails resolving 'scheduler' from inside react-dom-client.development.js on Windows + bun (Windows GAP-13). Pinning it at the workspace root hoists it where every consumer can find it.
comment_forgeax_deps: @forgeax/orchestrator became a self-contained npm tarball (bun build, files:['dist']) and dropped its @forgeax/* workspace dep declarations — its deps are bundled into dist for external consumers. But in-repo, server consumes orchestrator as SOURCE (via @forgeax/orchestrator/* tsconfig paths), so orchestrator/src's own imports of these @forgeax packages must resolve at runtime. Hoist them at the workspace root so every source consumer (orchestrator/src, agent-host/src) finds them.
